svg.title: AI-Augmented SDLC Framework for Angular, Java, Spring Boot, Mainframe
svg.desc: A framework showing how Claude Code and GitHub Copilot integrate across each SDLC phase for enterprise stacks.
svg.text: Angular · Java / Spring Boot · Mainframe · Claude Code + GitHub Copilot
Claude Code: user story generation, acceptance criteria, PRDs
Claude Code: C4 diagrams, API contracts, modernisation patterns for COBOL
Claude Code: security review, PR analysis, IaC generation (CDK/Terraform)
Copilot: PR description auto-fill, pipeline YAML suggestions in IDE
Claude Code: Javadoc, OpenAPI specs, runbooks, COBOL legacy documentation
Claude Code = agentic, multi-file, terminal-driven · Copilot = IDE-native inline completions · complementary, not competing
